source.content: A launch list derives unfinished state from draft_unsynced and opens the existing map with farm and plot identifiers. The map reuses the matching local draft. A mutation guard allows edits only while the launch and descendants are local and correctly related. Finalization validates required points and changes the status to finalized. A tree validator blocks an entire draft or structurally incomplete launch from synchronization. The media repository returns uploads only for finalized launches. The push coordinator marks only server-accepted records as synchronized and cleanup removes only fully synchronized finalized trees. One operation lock serializes mutation, finalization, migration, and synchronization.

readerTask: Explain how these cooperating parts implement resumable local drafts and safe synchronization for a repository-aware reader. Easify the result.
requiredFacts: The launch list and existing map resume the same local draft.
Mutation guards keep edits local and structurally valid.
The validator blocks an ineligible launch as a whole tree.
Media and selective acknowledgement provide independent sync safeguards.
The shared operation lock prevents mutation and sync races.
representationRequirements: Match layout to topology: use width for parallel user/sync paths and state alternatives, height for lifecycle sequence, and a hybrid when both matter.
Use the available surface without turning the explanation into a tall outline or a wrapping horizontal diagram.
Let the primary diagram carry causality, tables carry exact behavior mappings or comparisons, and the concrete example carry action-to-outcome branches.
Use representations only when they add a distinct relationship; give each claim one primary home.
Organize implementation by responsibility and runtime flow without an unrequested source catalog.
failureSignals: A mostly vertical outline underuses horizontal space for parallel paths and alternatives.
A diagram, table, example, and prose repeat the same relationship.
A table contains only source locations or the concrete example does not compare actions and outcomes.
prohibitedOverclaims: A draft or its media can synchronize before finalization.
Every captured local record is marked synchronized regardless of server acceptance.
The representation proves runtime behavior without validation evidence.

questions.q: How does a user resume unfinished work?
questions.a: The list identifies the local draft and opens the existing map, which reuses that draft.

questions.q: What changes the launch from blocked to eligible?
questions.a: Successful finalization changes its status to finalized.

questions.q: Why can an incomplete child not leak independently?
questions.a: The validator treats the launch and descendants as one eligibility unit, with media guarded separately.

questions.q: What prevents synchronization from racing a local edit?
questions.a: The shared operation lock serializes those operations.
